title: ヨーロッパで猛暑続く ドイツなどで最高気温更新 死者相次ぐ

title: サッカーW杯 ユニフォームランキング 日本代表アウェー用2位に

title: ベネズエラ地震 死者1430人 救助は時間との闘いに

title: 日米韓 北朝鮮のサイバー活動への対応を協議

title: 台湾立法院長が訪米 米下院議長と安全保障など意見交わす

title: 北京 高層ビルに小型機衝突 操縦士1人死亡 13人けが 地元政府
snippet: 中国の首都 北京の中心部で26日、小型機が高層ビルに衝突して操縦士1人が死亡し、13人がけがをしたと地元政府が発表しました。ただ、発生から1日近くたってからの発表で、いきさつなど、詳しい状況も明らかに…

title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
snippet: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
snippet: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

title: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
snippet: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.

title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
snippet: The pilot and 10 passengers - including five first-time parachutists - died in the incident, local officials said.

title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
snippet: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

title: Australian man charged with murder after dead girl found in suitcase in Thailand
snippet: The 17-year-old's body was found discarded near a railway track on Saturday, police say.

title: Fourteen killed in Saudi Arabia helicopter crash
snippet: The aircraft belonged to state oil giant Aramco and the cause of the crash is being investigated.

title: Three firefighters die battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border
snippet: A number of blazes have been raging across Utah and Colorado, leading both governors to declare states of emergency.

title: Uganda's leading media outlets shut down by army chief
snippet: NTV and Daily Monitor say their offices in the capital are under "military siege".

title: 117 dead dogs found at California 'no-kill' animal rescue - many with gunshot wounds
snippet: Hundreds more animals are still missing from the California facility as investigators continue excavating the grounds.

title: Australia to double maximum penalty for platforms in breach of social media ban
snippet: Children under the age of 16 have been prevented from 10 key social media platforms in Australia since December 2025.

title: Trump's face is added to select US passports for America's 250th birthday
snippet: The commemorative special edition passports will be available on 6 July, and can only be applied for in person

title: Heatwave breaks records in Germany, Denmark and Czech Republic
snippet: An estimated 150 million people have been experiencing temperatures of over 35C across Europe.

title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
snippet: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

title: Budapest's first Pride since Orban left power
snippet: Budapest held its first Pride march since the end of former prime minister Viktor Orban's 16-year government with thousands turning out to celebrate.
